description_long: A round pepperoni pizza sits atop a dark, circular wooden serving board, accompanied by two small white dipping sauce containers filled with red sauce. The pizza features a golden-brown, hand-tossed crust and is generously topped with evenly spaced pepperoni slices and melted cheese. The cheese appears slightly browned in spots, indicating it has been baked to a crisp finish. The wooden board is thick and has a smooth, polished surface, providing a sturdy base for the pizza. The dipping sauces are placed near the edge of the board, easily accessible for sharing. No packaging or branding is visible, giving the presentation a classic, restaurant-style appearance.
description: A pepperoni pizza with a golden hand-tossed crust sits on a dark wooden board, accompanied by two white sauce containers. The pizza is topped with melted cheese and pepperoni, with no visible packaging or branding.
description_view_0: The pizza is centered on a dark wooden board with two white sauce containers positioned at the back right.
description_view_1: The pizza and board are seen from a slight angle, with the sauce containers now appearing closer to the front right.
description_view_2: The pizza is viewed from the opposite side, with the sauce containers now at the front left, showing more of the pizza's crust.
description_view_3: The pizza is seen from the left side, with the sauce containers at the back left, and the pizza's toppings and crust clearly visible.
